title: Redcrested cougar
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Redcrested cougar |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |class=[[Feline/Legends|Feline]] |subspecies= |races= |height= |length=4 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]{{CSWECite|III|86|redcrested cougar}} |wingspan= |mass=140 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Long [[Tooth/Legends|fangs]] and claws *[[Color/Legends|Red]] crest *Tail tipped with [[Bone/Legends|bone]] |lifespan= |origin=[[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] |habitat=Jungle |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Carnivore]] |language= }} {{Quote|I just want to get this stupid work over with.''"
"''The tower is only a hundred meters high.''"
"''Only. And cold and windy up at the top.''"
"''We may be fortunate enough to find a redcrested cougar waiting for us at the base. It would save us the climb.|ExGal-4 member [[Garth Breise]] and Yomin Carr|}} '''Redcrested cougars''' were large, [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]], [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Feline/Legends|felines]] native to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]]. Armed with large claws, [[Tooth/Legends|fangs]], and a [[Bone/Legends|bone]]-tipped tail, the cougars dwelt in Belkadan's jungles and occasionally attacked sentient beings. Redcrested cougars could not breathe Belkadan's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] after it was [[Terraforming/Legends|changed]] to noxious fumes by [[dweebit]]s released by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. ==Biology and appearance== Redcrested cougars were four-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Feline/Legends|felines]] that averaged 140 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] in mass and possessed a [[Color/Legends|red]] crest. The agile cougar's paws sported huge claws, and its [[Tooth/Legends|fangs]] measured ten [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]]. The tail of a redcrested cougar ended in a lump of [[Bone/Legends|bone]], which allowed the tail to be swung like a [[Club/Legends|club]]. ==Behavior== {{Quote|Redcrested cougars are night hunters, and they'll be thick about us, wanting to put a face to our strange scents.|ExGal-4 member [[Bendodi Ballow-Reese]], to other team members traveling in the jungle of Belkadan|}} A [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Diet/Legends|carnivore]], redcrested cougars dwelt in jungles and could travel through the [[Tree/Legends|trees]]. [[Standard day/Legends|Night]] hunters, the felines sometimes attacked sentient beings, and when exposed to a strange scent, the cougars worked to identify it. Redcrested cougars occasionally roared or growled. ==History== Redcrested cougars were native to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]], where they lived by [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], states that [[ExGal-4]] had existed for three [[Standard year/Legends|years]], and that the redcrested cougar attack occurred in the first year of the base. Therefore, the [[Feline/Legends|felines]] must have existed on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] by [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. Around that [[time]], the [[Extragalactic Society]] created the [[Listening post/Legends|listening post]] [[ExGal-4]] on Belkadan, and soon after its creation, a redcrested cougar breached the facility's walls by jumping over them from atop a tree and managed to seriously wound two ExGal-4 members before it was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by researcher [[Danni Quee]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' to prepare for an [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warrior]] [[Yomin Carr]], disguised as a researcher at ExGal-4, released [[Insect/Legends|insect]]-like [[dweebit]]s on Belkadan. These dweebits mutated [[Plant/Legends|plant]] life on the planet and [[Terraforming/Legends|converted]] the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] into a haze that was unbreathable and lethal for both the ExGal-4 researchers and the redcrested cougars of the jungles. ==Behind the scenes== Redcrested cougars appeared in [[1999]]'s ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', the first novel of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series, by [[R. A. Salvatore]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=starwars/article.asp?x=sw20020124b_njo|text=Staring at the Stars}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rotkammpuma |pl=Kuguar czerwonogrzebieniasty |es=Puma de cresta roja }} [[Category:Carnivorous creatures]] [[Category:Creatures of the Dalonbian sector]] [[Category:Felines]] [[Category:Non-sentient species]]
